bullets: Pray for traumatized believers in Indonesia who were forcibly driven from worship, asking God to grant them courage, legal protection, and the freedom to gather without fear.
Pray for three detained believers in China held on illegal-gathering charges, that God would sustain their health, comfort their families, and move authorities to release them swiftly.
Lift up the 20 Christians still held hostage in India and the grieving families of three peacemakers killed, asking God for their safe release and an end to the cycle of violence.
Ask God to intervene for more than 180 indigenous Christian families in India denied water and livelihoods for their faith, providing for their survival and restoring their dignity and rights.
Pray for the more than two million civilians in Gaza, including children and displaced families, as strikes continue and peace talks remain stalled.
Lift up the people of Lebanon, especially the one million displaced civilians and families grieving losses during the Eid holiday amid intensified airstrikes.
Ask God for protection over Iranian and regional civilians as US-Iran military exchanges continue and ceasefire negotiations remain fragile and unresolved.
Pray for the families of the 27 unarmed civilians killed in Sudan's ongoing civil war, and for an end to attacks on villages with no military presence.
Lift up the people of Ukraine as the UN warns the war risks spiraling out of control, and pray for leaders to pursue a path toward genuine peace.
Pray for the grieving families in Kenya who lost children in a school dormitory fire, and for healing for the many students seriously injured.
Ask God to protect the people of eastern Congo facing the deadly combination of armed conflict and an Ebola outbreak, and for health workers to reach those in need.
Lift up the people of Burkina Faso as civil society freedoms continue to narrow under military rule, and pray for students navigating an increasingly restricted environment.
Pray for foreign nationals in South Africa facing threats and violence, and for peaceful resolution of the tensions surrounding immigration.
Ask God for wisdom among leaders in Guatemala as questions over sovereignty, drug-related violence, and civilian safety remain unresolved.
Lift up people held in immigration detention facilities in the United States, and pray for humane conditions and just treatment for all detainees.
Pray for families in the Philippines who lost loved ones during the anti-drug campaign, and for a fair and transparent trial process at the International Criminal Court.
Pray for communities across Indonesia affected by multiple shallow earthquakes, that residents would have peace, safety, and protection from aftershocks or structural damage.
Pray for vulnerable people across Portugal, Italy, France, and neighboring countries enduring record-breaking heat, especially the elderly, children, and those without access to cool shelter.
Lift up residents of Guam and surrounding Pacific islands following a recent offshore earthquake, asking God for continued safety and calm as people remain alert for further seismic activity.
Ask God to comfort and reassure communities across the affected region of the United States startled by a widespread sonic boom, bringing peace to those who were frightened by the event.
